name: Ethos Technologies Inc.
summary: Ethos Technologies Inc. operates a digital insurance platform that enables consumers to apply for and purchase life insurance and related products. The company works with licensed carriers, independent agents, agencies, and third-party fintech channels to distribute activated policies. Revenue is earned through commissions paid by carriers based on annual premiums. Ethos also offers Wills & Estate Planning products alongside its core insurance offerings.

products.name: Life Insurance Platform
products.description: Digital platform enabling consumers to apply for and purchase life insurance policies through direct and third-party channels.

products.name: Wills & Estate Planning
products.description: Estate planning products offered alongside core life insurance products; not counted in activated policy metrics.

partnerships.description: Agencies use Ethos platform to sell insurance products through affiliated licensed agents.
Fintech partners refer consumers or enable insurance product sales through Ethos platform as part of third-party channel.
